title: Senior Instructional Designer at LinkedIn Learning India

jsonLd.title: Senior Instructional Designer at LinkedIn Learning India
jsonLd.description:
LinkedIn Learning India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Ghaziabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About LinkedIn Learning India:
LinkedIn Learning India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Student Assessment

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with LinkedIn Learning India!
